title: The Mask of the Gorilla
writer: Bernard Borderie, Antoine-Louis Dominique, Jacques Robert
actors: Lino Ventura, Charles Vanel, Pierre Dux
plot: Géo Paquet, aka The Gorilla, breaks from jail. Now an escaped convict, the elite agent must infiltrate a dangerous gang working for a foreign embassy as their leader, a spy enjoying diplomatic immunity, can't be arrested by regula...
